questions.text: In general, does site leadership understand the legal OH&S and DP requirements & how these obligations are fulfilled?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Plant manager can provide an overview of the legal requirements regarding OH&S and DP management and explain how these requirements are met and kept up to date.
工場長は労働安全衛生および防災管理に関する法的要件の概要を説明し、その要件に適合する方法、および内容が更新されていることを説明ができる。
questions.level_criteria: Site leadership can demonstrate general knowledge of their legal obligations in OH&S and DP management and how to fulfil these.
questions.interview_content:
In general, how are the site's legal requirements identified and fulfilled?
法令要求は、どのように特定され、順守されていますか？

questions.text: Does Site Leadership consider safety a priority?
questions.judgement_criteria:
All teammates interviewed stated that H&S is considered a high priority on site. Leadership address safety at the morning assembly, roll call, etc. 
面談した技能員の全員が、現場における安全衛生管理の優先度は高いと述べた。点呼・朝礼などの機会で安全に関する話を受けている。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements from workers indicate that safety is considered a priority by leadership. "
questions.interview_content:
How important is H&S at work? 
Does site leadership address safety at the morning assembly, roll-call, etc.?
職場において安全衛生は、どのように重要ですか？
朝礼や点呼の際に、管理者は安全に関する話をしていますか？
questions.onsite_observation:
Sample >3 work areas and talk with teammates about the importance of H&S on site.
3か所以上の作業地区を任意選択し、現場における安全衛生管理の重要性について技能員の話を聞く。

questions.text: Is Site Leadership involved in the OH&S management when a serious incident occurs?
questions.judgement_criteria:
All teammates stated that, at least, safety manager and site leadership representative (e.g. plant manager, department manager, line manager) was involved in the root cause analysis process when a serious incident(lost-time-injury, fire accident, etc.) occurred
重大インシデント発生時（休業災害・出火事故等）の原因分析プロセス(例:JS分析)には、技能員の全員が、少なくとも安全担当課長と現場の管理者（工場長、部門長、課長・主任・職長など）が参加対応していると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Communication records and statements from workers indicate that leadership is involved in OH&S management when serious incidents(lost-time-injury, fire accident, etc.) occur.
questions.interview_content:
What normally happens when a serious incident (lost-time injury, fire accident, etc.) occurs, who does what in your view? 
重大インシデント（休業災害・火災等）が発生すると、通常どのような事が起こりますか？あなたの見解では、誰が何をしますか？
questions.onsite_observation:
Sample >3 work areas and talk with teammates about last serious incident (lost-time injury, fire accident, etc.) on their line/at site.
3か所以上の作業地区を任意選択し、ラインおよび現場にて最後に発生した重大インシデント（休業災害・火災等）について技能員の話を聞く。

questions.text: Does line management actively provide feedback to teammates and promote safety while touring their department/area?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Line-management conducts floor observations(e.g. site tours) and provides feedback to teammates to ensure adherence to safety rules, such as procedures, standards, etc. 
手順、規格などの安全ルールが遵守されるように、製造課長・主任・職長は巡回等の現場確認を行い、技能員へフィードバックを行っている。
questions.level_criteria: Site tour(s) indicate that line-management conducts floor observations to ensure adherence to safety rules, such as procedures, standards, etc.
questions.onsite_observation:
Sample >3 work areas and observe the extend to which the supervisor is actively supervising/coaching
3か所以上の作業地区を任意選択し、監督者（主任・職長）が積極的に監督および指示を実施している範囲を観察する。
questions.document_check:
Review any documented systems used by leadership that demonstrates that safety-focused safety tours, observations, coaching, etc. occur at regular/frequent intervals. The plan, progress, and records of these activities are confirmed.
管理者による安全巡回、現場確認、コーチングなどが定期/不定期で行われていることを示す、文書化されたシステムが整備されているか確認する。またこれらの計画・進捗および記録について確認する。

questions.text: Do teammates know what their responsibilities are when it comes to Safety?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 all stated that they acknowledge and accept their own responsibilities when it comes to safety management, and can explain what this means.
任意選択した5名の技能員の全員が、安全管理に関する義務があることを認識していることを示し、これを受け入れると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements from teammates and line-managers indicate that they accept own responsibilities when it comes to safety management and the importance of their contributions.
questions.interview_content:
To what extend are you truly responsible for safety? And what does that mean to you? 
実際にあなたが負っている安全に関する責任は何ですか？あなたにとってそれは、何を意味しますか？

questions.text: Do teammates report hazards (e.g., near misses, hidden dangers) regularly? (:
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of the hazard reporting records for the last month show that at least 50% of hazards reported were from teammates on the factory floor. 
前月の危険状況報告記録を検証すると、報告された危険状況の50%以上は技能員によるものであった。
questions.level_criteria: Hazard reporting records indicate that teammates are actively involved in reporting and addressing hazards and risks in their daily jobs
questions.interview_content:
What was the last hazard (e.g., hidden danger/near miss) reported from within your department and who reported it?
自部署において、直近で報告された危険源（潜在的危険源、ヒヤリ等）は、何ですか？誰がそれを報告しましたか？
questions.document_check:
Review how many hazards (e.g., hidden dangers, near misses) have been reported over a given time period.
ある一定期間に報告された危険状況件数を検証する。

questions.text: Are good safety behaviors of teammates rewarded and recognized by managements??
questions.judgement_criteria:
In a sample of 3 managers, all 3 can explain when rewards are provided for good safety behavior/performance, and give the examples. 
任意選択した3人の管理者の全員が、優れた安全活動/成績を賞賛した事例を説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Good safety behaviors of teammates are rewarded and recognized by managements.
questions.interview_content:
How do you praise for safety behavior or performance?
どのように優れた安全行動や成績を褒める/称賛していますか？

questions.text: Is there an external/cross-plant safety meeting? If so, does safety manager share H&S issues or best practices?
questions.judgement_criteria:
During the attended meeting, management contributed to discussions' in the cross-plant/external safety meeting. (E.g. Safety manager meeting in SBU, meeting in the local safety association, etc.)
出席した会議では、工場間会議および外部関係者の安全衛生会議(例:SBU内の安全課長会議、地域の安全協力会等)で管理者が貢献していた（安全衛生の改善に向けた困りごと・問題・課題提起・ベストプラクティス共有）
questions.level_criteria: Management contributes to cross-plant and external H&S meetings during which H&S challenges and insights are shared
questions.onsite_observation:
Request to attend such a meeting and review what is being discussed 
会議への参加を依頼し（可能な場合）、議論の内容を確認する。
questions.document_check:
Review Meeting attendance Records and Minutes of Meetings shared.
会議出席記録、および議事録が共有されているかを検証する。

questions.text: Is there a long term OH&S strategy for the plant?
questions.judgement_criteria:
The Plant Manager can describe his/her 5-year OH&S strategy and its goals, and how it will be implemented and the goals achieved.
工場長は、工場の労働安全衛生戦略、その目標、導入方法、達成済み目標を説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Site leadership has incorporated the OH&S program in their overall strategy and can explain how the conflicting objectives are prevented in that strategy
questions.interview_content:
What do you want to achieve in the area of H&S during the next 5 years and how is that resourced? 
今後5年間で、安全衛生に関し、達成したことは何ですか？また、どのようにリソースを配分していますか？

questions.text: Do teammates feel comfortable stopping work if they feel there is a risk of injury?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates all confirm that they feel safety is essential. They are comfortable stopping work when they feel their safety is compromised. 
任意選択した5人の技能員が、安全が絶対不可欠であると述べた。安全が損なわれると思ったときには、躊躇なく作業を停止できる。
questions.level_criteria: All interviewed workers confirm that safety is essential and that they feel comfortable stopping work whenever health or safety might be compromised
questions.interview_content:
When health or safety might be compromised (e.g., you feel there is a risk of injury), what action do you take?  Do you feel comfortable stopping or not starting work if you feel unsafe?
災害リスクに直面した際、どのような行動をとりますか？例えば、安全を確認できるまで作業を止めたり、開始せずに待機することをどのように感じますか？

questions.text: Have applicable site-specific OH&S regulations been identified, and site-specific safety procedures been implemented that they are compliant with local regulation and SBU standards?
questions.judgement_criteria:
H&S manager can provide all of the applicable OH&S procedures for their specific site. 
安全担当課長は、現場または事務所にて当該労働安全衛生規定の一覧を示すことができる。
questions.level_criteria: Applicable site-specific OH&S regulations have been identified and current safety procedures and processes have been evaluated to ensure they are compliant with local regulation. SBU requirements.
questions.interview_content:
How have you ensured that all procedures applicable to your site have been developed & implemented, and meet local regulations & SBU standards? 
安全手順・実施事項の法令順守を評価するため、どのような方法をとっていますか？

questions.judgement_criteria:
All safety procedures and processes have been issued and approved by an authorized company subject matter expert.
すべての安全手順と安全プロセス（標準）は、権限を与えられた専門家によって承認・発行されている。
questions.level_criteria: Applicable site-specific OH&S regulations have been identified and current safety procedures and processes have been evaluated to ensure they are compliant with local regulation. SBU requirements.

questions.text: Are safety results (KPIs) being monitored by leadership?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Safety KPIs are tracked at plant, department and line level.
安全関連KPIは、工場、部門、ラインレベルで追跡管理されている。
questions.level_criteria: Safety performance (Safety KPIs) based on OH&S policy is monitored and tracked by site leadership. KPI
questions.onsite_observation:
Review Line/Cell Boards (e.g. PDCA, Daily Meeting boards) for updated Safety KPI's
ラインや作業地区のボード（PDCA、日次会議ボードなど）で、安全関連のKPIが更新されているかを検証する。
questions.document_check:
Review safety performance KPI's.
安全関連KPIの検証

questions.judgement_criteria:
To solve issues on H&S, site leadership follow safety KPIs, and give directions to review the safety program if necessary. 
工場長は安全課題を解決するため、安全関連KPIをフォローし、必要に応じて安全施策の見直しを指示している。
questions.level_criteria: Safety performance (Safety KPIs) based on OH&S policy is monitored and tracked by site leadership. KPI

questions.text: Are the root causes of incidents categorized and then tracked?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of 10 most recent incident records show that the cause has been determined and the countermeasures are followed-up by the termination. 
直近10件の災害(労働災害・業務上疾病・ヒヤリ)記録を検証すると、分類ごとに原因が特定され、対策完了までフォローされている。
questions.level_criteria: Incident investigation records identify the root causes of incidents, categorizes them, and tracks the number of incidents by each category. (Human error, system error, Natural causes) *()
questions.document_check:
Review incident investigation records and determine over a sample what common causes were.
インシデント調査記録を検証し、任意選択したものの中から共通原因を判定する。

questions.text: Are there repercussions/consequences for not following the Safety Rules and procedures? /
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 managers all confirm that there are repercussions/consequences for teammates that do not follow the Safety Rules and Procedures. 
任意選択した3人の管理者が、安全規則や手順を違反した従業員には罰則が発生することを示した。
questions.level_criteria: Leadership often emphasizes the importance of the Safety Rules and breaking the rules results in repercussions/consequences.
questions.interview_content:
Are there repercussions/consequences for teammates who break the safety rules and procedures?
（安全）ルール違反をした従業員に対し、影響/結果（罰則）はありますか？
questions.document_check:
Review disciplinary procedure & documented examples of carrying out disciplinary action.
罰則手順書および罰則事例を検証する。

questions.text: Does Leadership use "Leading indicators" in their safety result tracking? KPI
questions.judgement_criteria:
Safety KPIs are tracked positively at plant, department and line level - using "Leading indicators"(e.g. Progress of RA, KPI for 3S activity, internal H&S audits findings, etc.)
安全関連KPIは「先行指標」（例：RA進捗、3S活動評価、内部監査の指摘事項等のプロセスKPI）を使用して、工場、部門、ラインのレベルで積極的に追跡管理されている。
questions.level_criteria: Leadership keeps track of leading indicators to determine the results of investments made to improve health and safety at the facility
questions.onsite_observation:
Review site system for updating and communicated safety KPI's
安全関連のKPIが更新されコミュニケーションされていることを現場の仕組みで検証する
questions.document_check:
Review safety performance KPI's to see if these are leading or lagging.
Review Plant PDCA Board or other means of communicating safety results (KPI's) & updated status.
安全関連のKPIの項目が先行値か遅延値かを検証する。
工場のPDCAボードまたはその他の安全KPIや改善履歴について確認する。

questions.judgement_criteria:
Site leadership follow not only lagging indicator(e.g. # of injuries), but also leading indicators, and give directions to review and/or improve safety programs/systems/activities if necessary. 
工場長は、結果系KPI（災害件数等）だけでなく、先行指標(プロセスKPI）をフォローし、必要に応じて施策の見直し・改善を指示している。
questions.level_criteria: Leadership keeps track of leading indicators to determine the results of investments made to improve health and safety at the facility

questions.text: Are pre and post assessments used to determine the effectiveness of OH&S initiatives?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 OH&S projects all show that pre-assessments and post-assessments took place to monitor the effectiveness of new OH&S incentives.
任意選択した3件の安全衛生プロジェクトで、事前評価と事後評価が実施され、労働安全衛生インセンティブの有効性が確認できる。
questions.level_criteria: Managers and/or the safety department are conduct pre- and post- assessments to determine the effectiveness of OH&S initiatives /()
questions.document_check:
Sample 3 H&S projects and review the pre- and post assessment results 
3件以上の安全衛生プロジェクトを任意選択し、事前評価と事後評価を検証する。

questions.text: Does leadership motivate teams to find and implement new best practices relevant to safety?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 managers, 1 can explain how they motivate teams to find best practices and how they allocate resources to implement them. 
任意選択した3人の管理者のうち1人が、チームに対してベストプラクティスを模索する動機付けの方法、および導入するためのリソースを割り当てる方法を説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Leadership motivate teams to find the best safety practices and provide the resources to implement them.
questions.interview_content:
How do teams find the relevant best practices when it comes to safety?
各部署は、どのように安全衛生に関するベストプラクティスを収集していますか？

questions.text: Are the OH&S management processes required by regulations executed on time?
questions.judgement_criteria:
All observed OH&S management processes have been implemented, and comply with SBU or external requirements(e.g. requirements required by regulation).
観察した労働安全衛生管理プロセスは、内部または外部要求（例:法令要求）に応じて遅延なく実行されている。
questions.level_criteria: Review of records indicates that legally required OH&S management processes are implemented in a consistent manner.
questions.onsite_observation:
Observe in >1 work area the implementation of OH&S processes required by regulation & SBU procedure (e.g. LOTO, Working at Heights)
法的要件の労働安全衛生の実施事項（LOTO、高所作業など）の実施状況について、3つ以上の作業地区を視察する。

questions.text: Are safety initiatives being implemented to improve safety or improve operational results?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Safety department plans to improve safety activities in the plant, and the plan is implemented.
安全担当部署では、工場全体の安全活動の改善業務が、計画され実行されている。
questions.level_criteria: Safety Initiatives are being implemented to improve safety results, not operational performance results.
questions.interview_content:
Review current safety related projects documentation, establishing their purpose and expected results.
現在の安全関連プロジェクトの書類、それらの目的、期待されるを結果は何か？
questions.document_check:
Project Charter; Technical Base Plan; Training documents.
取組み計画、技術基本計画（改造等）、教育関連資料。

questions.text: Does leadership know how important teammate involvement in safety is, and involve teammates in safety activities?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 2 managers could both explain why teammate involvement in safety management is important and can provide examples of actions taken (e.g., assigned safety-related tasks/activities, participation in safety committee, etc.) to promote this and the results of those actions.
任意選択した2人の管理者が、安全管理への従業員の参加対応が重要である理由を説明し、その促進活動の例（例：安全活動への参加促進、業務指示、労働安全衛生委員会への出席等）および結果を示すことができる。
questions.level_criteria: Leadership understand the importance of teammate involvement in safety management and can demonstrate clear actions regularly incorporated to help the site realize the positive results of those actions.
questions.interview_content:
What are your expectations of teammates when it comes to the teammates' involvement in H&S management? 
あなたは、従業員に対し、安全衛生に関し、どのような期待を持っていますか？

questions.text: Is there a H&S meeting with representation from teammates, leadership and H&S, and leadership give directions to solve issues?
questions.judgement_criteria:
During the attended meeting, the H&S team discussed the improvement of safety on site, and the meeting was well attended (>75% of members at every meeting). 
出席した会議では、安全担当課が現場の安全性の向上について議論し、多数の参加者がいた（すべての会議で全メンバーの75%を超えるメンバーが参加）。
questions.level_criteria: The H&S team, teammates and leadership meet at planned intervals to provide inputs to improve safety on site.
questions.onsite_observation:
Request attendance at such a meeting and observe what is being discussed. (If a validation assessment, and not able to attend such a meeting, ask for meeting minutes, attendance sheets, etc. that will support the judgement criteria.)
そのような会議への出席許可を要請し、議論されている内容を観察する。 参加が難しい場合はそれら会議の議事録や出席表を確認し、判断の根拠とする。

questions.text: Are there ongoing safety projects addressing safety issues?
questions.judgement_criteria:
The H&S manager has identified the top 3 risks on site based on data and feedbacks from teammates, and can describe the measures or activity for improvement. 
安全担当課長は、現場からの意見を踏まえた上で自職場の安全上の課題の優先度を認識しており、その対応方法や改善活動、計画とその進捗について説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: There is a clear OH&S program consisting of multiple improvement/enhancement projects and allocated budgets to address defined OH&S priorities
questions.interview_content:
What are your top-3 risks and how are these being mitigated? 
あなたにとって、トップ3のリスクは何ですか？それらはどのように低減されていますか？

questions.text: Have you gathered best practices on safety activity from GBS/SBU or external companies, and implement them in the plant? GBS/SBU
questions.judgement_criteria:
The H&S manager can give examples of industry best practices, where they came from and how they have been, or are being implemented on site. 
安全担当課長は、業界のベストプラクティスの例、その出所、現場における導入方法を示すことができる。（今後実施予定のベストプラクティスを示すことも含める）
questions.level_criteria: The safety team can demonstrate how industry(tire industry, rubber industry, manufacturing industry, etc.) *best-practice and scientifically proven best-practices are incorporated in their H&S program ( *
questions.interview_content:
How do you source best-practices and use these to benefit your H&S program? 
あなたは、どうやってベストプラクティスを収集していますか？
また、それらを事業所の安全衛生プログラムにどのように生かしていますか？

questions.text: Are general H&S risks explained during new-hire training to new teammates?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates recognize the H&S risks applicable in their areas and confirmed these were addressed in trainings. 
任意選択した5人の技能員が、それぞれの地区に適用される安全衛生関連のリスクを認識しており、その内容が教育訓練で対応されていることが確認できる。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates are made aware of general H&S risks during new hire training.
questions.interview_content:
What are the three greatest potential risks relevant to your work? 
あなたの仕事で3件の最重要リスクは何ですか。

questions.text: Is management aware of their personal impact on safety and do they leverage this to improve safety?
questions.judgement_criteria:
In a sample of 3 managers, >1 stated that they do have an impact on teammate safety and they involve themselves with safety processes. 
任意選択した3人の管理者のうち1人以上が、自身が従業員の安全に影響を及ぼし、安全プロセスに参加対応していると述べた。（例：巡回による安全状況確認、安全対策の優先順位付け、予算割り当て等）
questions.level_criteria: Management is aware of their responsibility in keeping teammates safe and enforcing safety rules and procedures.
questions.interview_content:
How can/do you contribute to a safer execution (implementation) of safety procedures, projects, requirements? 
安全な作業、要求事項を実行するために、あなたはどのような貢献ができますか。

questions.text: Do teammates know how to report incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger)?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of the incident records from the last month show that teammates have been reporting incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger). In a sample of 5 teammates, at least 4 could explain how to report when an incident happen.
前月のインシデント記録を検証すると、インシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）を従業員が報告していることがわかる。任意選択した5人の技能員のうち4人以上がインシデント発生時の報告方法を知っている。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates know how to report when incident(injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss, hidden danger, fire) occurs, and incident reporting records and interview statements indicate that teammates report incidents. ()
questions.interview_content:
How do you report an incident (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger)?
Have you reported any recently, or are aware of any recently reported incidents?
あなたが最近報告したインシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）は何ですか？
もしくは、最近他の技能員によって報告された事例は何かありますか？
questions.document_check:
Review incident records and cross-reference these with interview statements 
インシデント記録を検証し、面談調査と比較検討する。

questions.text: Do teammates know the department/job safety rules applicable to them? /
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates can all explain the Department/Job Safety Rules in their work area and why they are important and relevant. 
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、自身の作業地区における当該の部門規則や業務安全ルールについて説明でき、規則の重要性と関連性について理由を説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates demonstrate a clear understanding of the H&S rules involved in their work and the relevance of these rules
questions.interview_content:
What are the most important safety rules to you and why? 
あなたにとって最も重要な安全規則は何ですか、それはなぜですか。

questions.text: Do you understand the greatest potential risks, and how they are controlled?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates could all describe and explain the greatest potential H&S risks in their work, and what controls they use or are in place to mitigate these risks.
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、各自の作業における最も深刻な安全衛生関連のリスクおよびリスク低減措置について説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements indicate that teammates take trainings and understand the greatest potential H&S risks involved in their work and the controls applied to reduce these risks.
questions.interview_content:
Which safety risks involved in your work/job are the most serious in your opinion and why? 
あなたの業務や役割において最も深刻だと思う安全リスクとその理由を教えてください。

questions.text: Have teammates proposed improvements of H&S risks and risk mitigation measures at the creations or revisions of work standards, training materials, etc.
questions.judgement_criteria:
Materials indicate that teammates propose improvements of H&S risks and risk mitigation measures at the creations or revisions of work standards, training materials, etc.
作業標準や教育資料等を作成、改訂する際、技能員が、安全リスクや低減策の改善提案をしていることが示される。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates propose improvements of H&S risks and risk mitigation measures at the creations or revisions of work standard, training material, etc.
questions.document_check:
Review work standards and training materials to see if revision history and content show inclusion of teammate's recommendations/suggestions.
作業標準や教育訓練資料を検証し、改訂履歴とその内容に技能員の意見が含まれているかを確認する。

questions.text: Are some teammates capable of performing full risk assessments?
questions.judgement_criteria:
In a sample of 5 teammates, at least two have participated RA process, and he/she could explain a full and accurate Risk Assessment. 
任意選択した5人の技能員のうち2人以上が、リスクアセスメントに参加したことがあり、リスクアセスメントを完全かつ正確に実施できる。
questions.level_criteria: A sample of teammates participate in the risk assessment (RA) process, and they can demonstrate capability in performing a risk assessment on their work activities
questions.interview_content:
Have you participated in RA process? If so, could you explain the RA process on your work place?
自職場の作業に関して、RAに参加したことがありますか？もしあれば、リスクアセスメントプロセスを説明してください。

questions.text: Do teammates know safety related information (H&S risk, recurrence prevention measures issued by GBS/SBU, etc.) shared among teams (department/areas) and plants? /GBS/SBU
questions.judgement_criteria:
In a sample of 3 managers, 2 could explain how teams (departments/areas) share safety knowledge about H&S risks and risk mitigation with other teams and different sites. 
任意選択した3人の管理者のうち2人が、安全衛生関連のリスクとリスク低減に関する安全関連情報を他のチームや別の現場とどのように共有するかを説明できた。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates are encouraged to talk with other teams and speak about H&S risks regularly to share best-practices and lessons-learned.
questions.interview_content:
How is safety knowledge shared between teams and plants? 
部署間と工場間で安全関連の知識をどのように共有していますか。

questions.text: Do you think that safety is considered more important than production?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Teammates know that safety is considered more important than operational results.
各従業員は、生産よりも安全が重要であることを知っている。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates know that safety is considered more important than production.
questions.interview_content:
What would be considered a priority: complete the production plan or follow safety procedures?
あなたにとって、生産計画の完了と安全手順の準拠ではどちらが優先事項ですか。
questions.onsite_observation:
Conduct a site tour during peak and off hours to see if behavior is(un)safer 
Talk to teammates on the shop floor about the priority that safety has over production.
ピーク時間帯とピーク以外の時間帯に現場を視察して、安全な行動を取っているかを確認する。
生産よりも安全が優先されることについて、製造現場の従業員と話をする。

questions.text: Are teammates involved in preventing recurring incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger)?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates, at least 2 said they take part in the actions required to prevent incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) and provide feedback if these actions are not appropriate or useful. 
任意選択した5人の技能員のうち2人以上が、インシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）防止のために必要な対応措置に参加し、その対応措置が不適切または有用でない場合にはフィードバックを提供すると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates are involved in the actions implemented to prevent the reoccurrence of an incident (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss, hidden danger, fire) relevant to their daily job to ensure the appropriateness of such actions ()
questions.interview_content:
If you are involved in preventing incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger), what do you do for recurrence prevention?
もし、インシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）の発生にあなたが関与していた場合、あなたは再発防止のために何をしますか

questions.text: Are the Department/Job Safety rules being followed strictly? /
questions.judgement_criteria:
When 3 different work areas were toured and observed, there was a strict adherence to the Department/Job safety rules of that area by the people working in that area. 
3か所以上の作業地区を視察すると、その地区の作業者は各作業地区における当該の部門規則や業務安全ルールを厳守していた。
questions.level_criteria: Site tour(s) indicates a structural adherence to the Department/Job Safety Rules applied to the sampled working areas.
questions.onsite_observation:
Observe work in three work areas to see if people work in accordance to safety rules 
3か所の作業地区で作業を観察し、安全規則に従って作業が行われているか確認する。

questions.text: Have teammates proposed improvements for @reventation of incidents (injure/near-miss/hidden danger) and management has given feedback to them?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Teammates proposed improvements on incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) prevention, and received feedback from managements.
技能員は、インシデント（災害、疾病、ヒヤリ・不具合に関する改善提案を行い、管理者からFBを受けていることが確認できる。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates proposed improvements to prevent incidents (injure, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) and received feedback from managements.
questions.interview_content:
How have you respond to proposals for improvement  to prevent incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) from teammates?
技能員からのインシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）の改善提案に対して、どのように対応していますか？

questions.text: Are teammates involved and consulted in safety action plans?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A  review of the safety action plans from the most recent safety projects show  teammates were involved and consulted. 
直近の安全プロジェクト（安全に関する取り組み）における安全関連の活動計画を検証すると、技能員の参加対応と協議があったことが示された。
questions.level_criteria: Review of action plans show that teammates have been involved in the design, implementation and evaluation of safety action plans.
questions.document_check:
Review  action plans or project planning to determine if these involve consultation steps with workers 
活動計画またはプロジェクト計画を検証し、技能員との協議が行われているかを判断する。

questions.text: Is unsafe behavior completely unacceptable on site?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 operators all stated that unsafe behavior is unacceptable and anyone acting unsafe will be corrected by their peers. 
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、不安全行動は容認できないと述べ、不安全行動をとる者は同僚によって指摘されると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements and site tour(s) indicate that unsafe behavior is perceived as unacceptable. It is that anyone acting unsafe will be corrected by their peers.
questions.interview_content:
What response would you expect from your colleague when you act unsafe? 
あなたが不安全行動をした場合、あなたの同僚はどのような反応をすると期待しますか。

questions.text: Do managers explain safety requirements based on site-specific regulation to teammates?
questions.judgement_criteria:
In a sample of 3 managers,  > 1 stated that they explain safety requirements based on site-specific regulation to teammates.
任意選択した3人の管理者のうち1人以上が、安全に関する法的要求事項を技能員へ説明している　と述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Managers explain safety requirements based on regulation to teammate.
questions.interview_content:
What requirement do you explain to operators on safety requirements based on regulation?
安全に関する法的要求に関して、あなたはどういった内容を技能員に説明していますか？
questions.document_check:
Review documented trainings, meetings, etc. where this information would be provided and explained. (e.g., minutes, education manual/record)
これらの情報が提供される会議・打ち合わせもしくは教育の記録等を確認する。

questions.text: Are teammates informed of recent safety incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) in their areas and know what actions have been taken to address these?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates can all state that they are informed of recent safety incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) in their areas and actions have been taken to address these. 
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、自職場で発生した安全関連のインシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）と対策情報の連絡を受けた実績がある。
questions.level_criteria: Statements from teammates indicate that they are informed of recent safety incidents relevant to them and the follow-up/actions taken to address them.
questions.interview_content:
What incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) and the countermeasures were you informed of from management?
最近、連絡を受けたインシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）とその対策は何ですか？
questions.document_check:
Review incident (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss/hidden danger) records and cross-reference these with interview statements 
インシデント（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）記録を検証し、面談調査と比較検討する。

questions.text: Are teammates regularly trained about the departmental/job safety rules applicable to them? /
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates all agreed that employees are regularly reminded and trained of the Department/Job Safety rules in their area.
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、自身の作業地区における当該の部門規則や業務安全ルールについて定期的に周知され、教育を受けていると回答した。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates are trained at planned intervals of the different H&S rules aimed at ensuring their safety.
questions.interview_content:
How can you provide feedback to management on safety rules? 
安全ルールに関してどのように管理者へフィードバックしていますか？

questions.text: Have teammates taken training on residual risks based on the work standard
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates could all state that they took the training on residual risks based on the work standard. 
意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、残留リスクについて作業標準ベースに教育を受けていると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements indicate that teammates take trainings and understand the greatest potential H&S risks involved in their work and the controls applied to reduce these risks.
questions.interview_content:
Have you taken the training on the residual risks in your tasks?
あなたは自作業の残留リスクについて教育を受けましたか？

questions.text: Are there opportunities to share H&S risks/measures of other departments at the safety meeting in your department? /()
questions.judgement_criteria:
H&S risks/measures of other departments have been shared at the safety meeting in your department.
自部署内の安全衛生会議等で、他部署での安全リスク/対策について共有されている.
questions.level_criteria: H&S risks/measures of other departments have been shared at the safety meeting in your department. /
questions.document_check:
Review the safety meeting material and minutes
会議資料や議事録を確認する。

questions.text: Do you have opportunities to get *best practices from internal/external sources, and do you implement them in the plant? *
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of the safety processes shows that H&S team has implemented best practices from other sites and these have yielded positive results. 
安全関連プロセス(標準)を検証すると、安全衛生管理チームが他の現場のベストプラクティスを導入し、肯定的な結果を得たことを示している。
questions.level_criteria: The site safety department communicates their best-practices in risk control with other plants to ensure cross-company learning and awareness.
questions.document_check:
Review what best-practices have been communicated and how well these were implemented
どのようなベスト・プラクティスが伝達され、どのように実施されたかを検証する。

questions.text: Is the legally required H&S training (including safety/disaster emergency drills) given to all teammates?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of the most recent training records show that a sample of 10 randomly selected teammates (regardless of rank) have all received the　H&S training (including safety/disaster emergency drills) required by regulation.
直近の教育訓練記録を検証すると、無作為に選択した10人（職位無視）の全員が、法的に必要な安全衛生関連の訓練（安全・防災の緊急時対応訓練を含む）を受けていた。
questions.level_criteria: Compliance evaluation and training records indicate that H&S training required by regulation (including safety/disaster emergency drills) has been provided to all teammates.
questions.document_check:
Review local requirements and training records (including safety/disaster emergency drills)to see if a sample of teammates are properly trained. 
現地のコンプライアンス記録と教育訓練記録を検証して、任意選択した従業員に適切な教育訓練が提供されているかを確認する。

questions.text: Are incident investigations carried out by qualified people?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A review of the incident records show the last 5 incidents were investigated by qualified people, and the causes were identified and added to the risk tracking.
インシデント記録（労働災害、疾病、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）を検証すると、直近5件のインシデントが知識・能力を有した者によって調査され、原因を特定し、リスク登録簿に追加されていた。
questions.level_criteria: Incident(injury, fire occupational disease/illness, near-miss, hidden danger)investigations are conducted by qualified people and the identified causes are included in the risk tracking as to-be-controlled risks (SE
questions.document_check:
Review the risk and incident records to identify their correspondence 
リスク記録とインシデント記録を検証して、相互に対応しているかを確認する。

questions.text: Are current Safety rule's effectiveness being evaluated by a team?
questions.judgement_criteria:
The H&S manager could describe how the H&S rule's effectiveness is evaluated, who is involved in the evaluation process and how the processes are improved after evaluation. Further, the evaluation includes input by Teammates & Supervisors, along with H&S.
安全担当課長は、安全ルールの有効性の評価方法、評価担当者の氏名、評価後のプロセス改善方法を説明できる。またそれらの評価に安全担当課や技能員の意見が反映されている。
questions.level_criteria: The H&S team, teammates and their supervisors evaluate the design, implementation and effectiveness of current safety rules in order to optimize these
questions.interview_content:
How is the effectiveness of H&S rules evaluated? 
Are Teammates, Supervisors and H&S involved with the evaluations?
安全ルールの有効性をどのように評価していますか。 またそれらの評価に技能員は関与していますか？

questions.text: Is there a skill matrix table for teammates that identifies the training requirements/needs for each job, including training dates?
questions.judgement_criteria:
There are mandatory training requirements for each activity.
Specific safety trainings are repeated at a standard interval to ensure the competence of people working on site and ensure compliance with local and SBU requirements.
必須の教育訓練要件が定められており、安全教育訓練が標準化された間隔で繰り返し実施されていることを確認できた。
questions.level_criteria: Specific safety trainings are repeated at a standard interval to ensure the competence of people working on site. There are mandatory training requirements for each activity.
questions.document_check:
Review the skill matrix table for teammates and training dates.
能力要件表と教育の実施日を確認する。

questions.text: Do work/job specific trainings highlight safety risks and processes associated with that work/job?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Safety instructions and safety training were included in the work specific training materials. 
特定作業の教育訓練において、教育資料には、安全関連の指示事項と安全教育訓練が含まれていた。
questions.level_criteria: Safety instructions and trainings have been integrated into regular job-related training which is provided to teammates before they start the associated work.
questions.document_check:
Review work/job specific training materials
作業訓練資料を確認する

questions.text: Is risk assessment one of the first actions taken when planning new projects/work sessions? /1RA
questions.judgement_criteria:
With a sample of 3 managers, at least 2 said that Risk assessment is always done in the early planning stages for upcoming projects/work sessions.
任意選択した3人の管理者の2人以上が、新しいプロジェクトや作業の初期計画段階でリスク評価を常に実施していると述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Risks are assessed at the earliest possible planning stages of every team in the organization to avoid risks where they might materialize.
questions.interview_content:
What aspects do you consider when planning new/modified projects? 
新規もしくは変更を伴うプロセスの計画作成時に、どのような点を考慮していますか。

questions.text: Do teammates communicate injuries/near-misses/defects to managers, and does management follow-up on them? //
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 managers can all show items recently reported to them and the examples of follow-ups associated with the reports. 
任意選択した3人の管理者の全員が、最近報告された内容とそのフォローアップ活動の例を示すことができる。
questions.level_criteria: Incidents (injury, occupational disease/illness, near-miss, hidden danger) defects are communicated to management and they are encouraged to follow-up.
questions.interview_content:
How are you informed of incidents (injuries, near-misses, hidden dangers, etc.,) and what sort of follow-up process do you follow?
自身のプロセスに重要な安全衛生管理リスク（労働災害、ヒヤリ、潜在的危険源）について、どのように情報を得ていますか。

questions.text: Is passive communication, such as notification boards and e-mails, being used to convey safety information?
questions.judgement_criteria:
The H&S manager informs teammates of up to date safety information by notice boards, via emails, or other relevant passive communication system on site.
安全担当課長は、安全関連の最新情報について、掲示板やメール送信等を用いて展開している。
questions.level_criteria: Teammates are made aware of the function of safety controls through passive communication channels such as notice boards and e-mails
questions.interview_content:
Is passive communication, such as notification boards and e-mails, being used to convey safety information to Teammates?
従業員に自身の安全管理項目を理解させるために、どのような手段を用いていますか。（例：掲示板、メールによる展開）

questions.text: Does management know what safety initiatives are active on site and how they are performing, and impact on the site's lagging indicators?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 managers could all describe the most recent H&S initiatives to improve H&S management on site, and knew if the results were positive or negative. 
任意選択した3人の管理者の全員が、現場の安全衛生管理改善を目的とした直近の安全衛生の取り組みを説明でき、結果の良し悪しを知っていた。
questions.level_criteria: H and S activities are observed/reviewed by management for results and activities have the opportunity for continuous improvement about the lagging performance indication (e.g. # of injury, frequency rate, etc.) .
questions.interview_content:
What current safety initiatives are active, and have they resulted in improving lagging indicator performance?
直近の安全衛生管理の取り組みは、どのような成果がありましたか。 また、進捗が遅れている取り組みに対してどのような対応を行いましたか。

questions.text: Do teammates know who to speak to about H&S/DP and how the reporting structure works?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates could all explain who they would report specific safety/disaster issues to.
任意選択した5名の従業員の全員が、安全・防災関連の特定の課題を誰に報告するかについて説明できた。
questions.level_criteria: Interview statements indicate that teammates know who to report to in order to fulfil their H&S/DP relevant responsibilities
questions.interview_content:
When safety/disaster issue X would occur, who would you logically talk to? 
安全・防災上の課題Xが発生した場合、必然的に対話する相手は誰ですか。

questions.text: Is there a system on management of changes?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 supervisors all explained system and scope of management of change(4M changes).
任意選択した3人の監督者の全員が、４M変更管理の仕組み・対象について説明できた。
questions.level_criteria: Forepersons/supervisors understand the system and scope of management of changes(4M changes) 4M
questions.interview_content:
What is a contents of system and scope for management of change?
4M変更時のシステムとスコープは何ですか？

questions.text: Do management and process owners communicate with H&S team about upcoming changes on site, along with any risks associated with the change?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 supervisors all confirmed that they discuss with the H&S team the risks associated with upcoming changes to work processes.
任意選択した3人の監督者の全員が、作業工程の変更時、新規の作業が発生する際には、安全担当課とリスクと対応方法について討議したことを示した。
questions.level_criteria: Prior to a change in process or equipment, are the risks associated with the change reviewed, evaluated and communicated with H&S team.
questions.interview_content:
How and when do you involve the H&S team in discussions regarding planned changes in your process, along with any risks associated with the planned change?
あなたはリスクの変化を伴う作業方法や工程の変更（4M変更）時に、安全担当課をいつ、どのようにそれらに関する議論に参加させていますか。

questions.text: Does management take action when a hazard/injury/near-miss/defects is reported, and communicate these action to the reporter? ///
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 5 teammates all stated that management had taken specific actions to address hazards they reported, and these actions have been communicated to them 
任意選択した5人の技能員の全員が、自分たちが報告した危険状況に対して、管理者が特定の対応措置を実施し、その件について自分たちに報告があったと述べた。
questions.level_criteria: Risk records indicate that hazards/injury/near-miss/defects reported are used by management to take actions and the result of these actions are communicated with the reporter. ///
questions.interview_content:
What measures did the management take in response to the information you or your colleague reported? And what means was this feedback provided to you?
あなたもしくは同僚が報告した不具合情報に対して、管理者はどのような対応を実施しましたか。またそれをどのような手段であなたにフィードバックされましたか。

questions.text: Do you receive feedback from third party on effectiveness of safety management system
questions.judgement_criteria:
Regarding the safety management system in the plant, the H&S manager can explain evaluation results by third party, feedback, and the actions taken from these results.
安全担当全課長は、自工場のマネジメント改善のための第3者の評価、フィードバック、およびその対応を説明できる
questions.level_criteria: For the improvement of safety management system of the plant, external party evaluate the system.
questions.interview_content:
Do you use an external / third party to evaluate the effectiveness of the site's safety management system?
事業所の安全管理システムの有効性を評価するために、外部／第三者を利用していますか？

questions.text: Does management have defined roles and responsibilities for safety activities?
questions.judgement_criteria:
A sample of 3 managers could all explain their roles and responsibilities on safety activity in their department/section/area.
任意選択した3人の管理者の全員が、自部署の安全活動担当者について役割・活動内容を説明できる。
questions.level_criteria: Roles and responsibilities of safety activities set out, and they are understood by those required to fulfil them
questions.interview_content:
How do you ensure H&S roles and responsibilities are effectively allocated? 
安全衛生管理の役割と責任が効果的に割り当てられていることをどのように確認していますか。

questions.text: Is there collaboration between H&S and management to address recurring incidents, with focus on causation?
questions.judgement_criteria:

questions.interview_content:
Have you update/improve fire extinguishing equipment and/or fire fighting procedures based on inspections or training/demonstration drill?
消火設備の点検や消火訓練に関して、実施結果や不具合を基にした設備や標準の改善は行われていますか？
questions.document_check:
Confirm the malefaction records or improvement records.
不具合に関する記録または改善記録を確認する

questions.text: When a defect is found during the MUST11 inspection, do you improve the defect at that time? MUST11
questions.judgement_criteria:
They can answer at least one recent improvement case.
直近の改善事例を１つ以上回答できる
questions.level_criteria: Results of Mixing MUST11 inspection are reviewed by site top management. MUST11
questions.interview_content:
Have the inspection results of mixing Must 11 been reported to site management?
Are you involved in review on these inspection results?
精錬工程におけるMUST11項目の点検結果について、マネジメントへ共有を行いレビューされていますか？
questions.document_check:
Confirmation of meeting minutes and management review.
会議議事録・マネジメントレビューの確認

questions.text: Are corrective actions on emergency preparedness procedures taken when any opportunity for improvements are identified through training/drill?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Problems/concerns in the training are identified and improved.
訓練での不具合/懸念を洗出し､改善している
questions.level_criteria: Evacuation (training) method is reviewed/revised based on failures that have been detected during evacuation drills.
questions.interview_content:
- Were there any problems identified during the past evacuation drills?
- If yes, has such a problem been corrected? (Please tell me how to devise it.)
- 過去に発生した避難訓練時の不具合はありましたか？
- 不具合があれば、その不具合は改善されていますか？(工夫点を教えてください)
questions.document_check:
Confirm malfunction records or improvement records.
不具合に関する記録または改善記録を確認する

questions.text: Do you review the prevent measures on electrical wirings based on periodical inspections/maintenance?
questions.judgement_criteria:
Based on the maintenance results, the maintenance schedule, points, and methods are reviewed.
点検結果を基にした次年度の計画策定や点検箇所や方法の改善が検討されていることが示される
questions.level_criteria: Electric system(wiring/equipment) inspection points/items are reviewed based on feedbacks from in charge of inspectors. /
questions.interview_content:
Have you revised the maintenance standard/plan or updated inspection points based on maintenance result or feedback from maintenance PIC. 
電気配線の点検結果や点検者からのフィードバックによって、点検の方法や箇所について見直しているか？
questions.document_check:
Check that maintenance results are reviewed.
点検結果に関するレビューが行われているかを確認する

questions.text: Are changes designed, planned, executed and evaluated based on pre-defined safety criteria which include hazards, risks and industry best-practices? PDCA
questions.judgement_criteria:
A 50% sample of all MOC change requests from the last 6 months show that changes contain reference to hazards and risks identified on other sites implementing a similar change and best practices used on other sites. 
過去6か月の変更管理要求の50%のサンプルチェックにおいて、類似の変更時に他事業所で顕在化した危険源・リスク、他事業所の好事例が含まれている。
questions.level_criteria: Changes are designed, planned, executed and evaluated based on pre-defined safety criteria which include hazards, risks and industry *best-practices *
questions.interview_content:
Is the change management procedure calibrated against industry best practices?
変更管理手順は、業界の好事例と比較し、改訂されていますか？
questions.document_check:
Review change records to find such criteria 
基準を確認するため、変更記録を確認する。
